en.hello: Hello! I am Xobia, your AI mortgage and property assistant from Xoto. I can help you understand UAE home loans, property prices, eligibility, and the buying process. What would you like to know?
en.whoAmI: I am Xobia — Xoto's AI specialist for UAE mortgages and real estate. I can guide you on loan eligibility, down payments, interest rates, property search, and the full buying journey. Ask me anything!
en.mortgage: A mortgage is a home loan where the bank finances your property purchase. In the UAE, banks can lend up to 80% of the property value for properties under AED 5 million, and 70% for properties above AED 5 million.
en.eligibility: To be eligible for a UAE mortgage, you need a stable income, a good credit score, and a minimum salary of around AED 10,000–15,000 per month depending on the bank. Your total monthly debt repayments must not exceed 50% of your salary — this is called the DBR rule.
en.dbr: DBR stands for Debt Burden Ratio. In the UAE, your total monthly loan repayments — including the new mortgage — must not exceed 50% of your monthly salary. For UAE Nationals, the limit can be 55%.
en.downPayment: The minimum down payment in the UAE is 20% for properties under AED 5 million, and 30% for properties above AED 5 million. For non-residents, the down payment is 25% or more.
en.ltv: LTV stands for Loan-to-Value ratio. In the UAE, the maximum LTV is 80% for properties under AED 5 million, meaning the bank lends 80% and you pay 20% as a down payment.
en.interestRate: UAE mortgage rates typically range from 4% to 6% per year. Banks offer fixed rate (stable for 1–5 years) and variable rate (changes with the market).
en.preApproval: A mortgage pre-approval is a letter from the bank confirming how much they are willing to lend you before you find a property. Pre-approvals are usually valid for 60 to 90 days.
en.tenure: UAE mortgage loan terms can go up to 25 years. The loan must be fully repaid before retirement age — 65 for salaried employees and 70 for self-employed individuals.
en.process: The UAE mortgage process has 5 steps: check eligibility and get pre-approved, find your property, submit documents to the bank, bank valuates the property, and sign the transfer at the DLD.
en.documents: For a UAE mortgage you typically need: passport and visa copy, Emirates ID, last 3–6 months salary slips, bank statements, employment letter, and property details.
en.banks: Xoto partners with Emirates NBD, Abu Dhabi Commercial Bank, Dubai Islamic Bank, Mashreq Bank, and First Abu Dhabi Bank. We compare offers and find the best rate for your profile.
en.offPlan: Off-plan properties are bought before they are built. Developers usually offer 0% interest payment plans during construction. Once completed, you can finance the remaining balance with a standard mortgage.
en.price: UAE property prices vary widely. Studio apartments in Dubai start from AED 350,000. 1-bedroom apartments average AED 700,000 to AED 1.2 million. Luxury villas in prime areas range from AED 10 million and above.
en.location: Popular property areas in Dubai include Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Business Bay, and Jumeirah Village Circle. In Abu Dhabi: Yas Island, Al Reem Island, and Saadiyat Island.
en.booking: To buy a UAE property, you pay a 10% deposit, sign the Sales and Purchase Agreement, then apply for your mortgage. The final transfer happens at the Dubai Land Department.
en.developer: We partner with top UAE developers including Emaar, Damac, Aldar, Sobha Realty, and Nakheel — known for quality construction, on-time delivery, and strong after-sales service.
en.contact: You can reach our team at info@xoto.ae or call us at +971 4 000 0000. Our mortgage specialists are available 7 days a week.
en.amenities: UAE properties typically include 24/7 security, swimming pools, gyms, children's play areas, covered parking, and landscaped gardens. Premium developments also offer smart home systems and concierge services.
en.about: Xoto is the UAE's premier AI-powered property lifecycle platform. We unite real estate discovery, home financing, interior design, and eco-friendly landscaping into a single seamless ecosystem.
en.store: The Xoto Store is an e-commerce platform where you can purchase premium furniture, decor, smart home appliances, and building materials to design and enhance your space.
en.properties: Our Properties page displays premium real estate listings across the UAE. You can search, explore, and purchase apartments, luxury villas, and penthouses.
en.rent: The Rental page helps you browse a wide range of rental apartments and villas in prime UAE locations, complete with flexible leasing options.
en.aiPlanner: The AI Planner is our signature digital design tool. It uses advanced artificial intelligence to help you visualize, modify, and generate custom interior layouts and landscaping plans.
en.designs: Our Designs page showcases beautiful, finished interior and landscaping concepts created by our community of professional designers and contractors.
en.mortgages: The Mortgages page offers AI calculators to check your loan eligibility and affordability. We partner with leading UAE banks to get you pre-approved quickly.
en.howItWorks: Xoto works in three easy steps: Discover your dream property, Finance it using our digital mortgage tools, and Enhance it with AI design and store products.
en.quotation: The Quotation page allows you to submit your property details to receive a customized pricing estimate for interior design or landscaping work.
en.default: I am Xobia, your Xoto property and mortgage assistant. I can help with UAE home loans, down payments, eligibility, property prices, and the buying process. Please ask me anything or visit xoto.ae to speak with our team.

ar.hello: مرحباً! أنا زوبيا (Xobia)، مساعدتك الذكية للعقارات من زوتو. كيف يمكنني مساعدتك اليوم؟
ar.mortgage: الرهن العقاري هو قرض عقاري تموله البنوك. في الإمارات، يمكن للبنوك إقراض حتى 80٪ من قيمة العقار للعقارات التي تقل عن 5 مليون درهم.
ar.downPayment: الدفعة الأولى في الإمارات 20٪ للعقارات أقل من 5 مليون درهم و30٪ للعقارات أعلى من ذلك.
ar.price: تبدأ أسعار الشقق من 350,000 درهم للاستوديو في دبي. الشقق المكونة من غرفة نوم واحدة تتراوح من 700,000 إلى 1.2 مليون درهم.
ar.contact: يمكنك التواصل معنا على info@xoto.ae أو الاتصال على +971 4 000 0000.
ar.about: زوتو هي المنصة الرائدة في دولة الإمارات المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي لإدارة دورة حياة العقار.
ar.default: أنا زوبيا، مساعدتك الذكية من زوتو. يمكنني مساعدتك في العقارات والقروض العقارية في الإمارات.

hi.hello: नमस्ते! मैं ज़ोबिया हूँ — Xoto की AI मॉर्गेज और प्रॉपर्टी सहायक। आप मुझसे यूएई होम लोन, पात्रता, डाउन पेमेंट — कुछ भी पूछ सकते हैं।
hi.mortgage: मॉर्गेज एक होम लोन है जिसमें बैंक आपकी प्रॉपर्टी खरीदने के लिए पैसे देता है। यूएई में AED 5 मिलियन से कम की प्रॉपर्टी पर 80% तक लोन मिलता है।
hi.downPayment: यूएई में AED 5 मिलियन से कम की प्रॉपर्टी पर 20% डाउन पेमेंट देनी होती है। AED 5 मिलियन से ऊपर पर 30% देनी होती है।
hi.price: दुबई में स्टूडियो अपार्टमेंट AED 350,000 से शुरू होते हैं। 1-बेडरूम AED 700,000 से AED 1.2 मिलियन तक होते हैं।
hi.contact: हमसे info@xoto.ae पर संपर्क करें या +971 4 000 0000 पर कॉल करें।
hi.about: Xoto UAE का पहला AI-संचालित प्रॉपर्टी प्लेटफॉर्म है।
hi.default: मैं ज़ोबिया हूँ — Xoto की AI सहायक। यूएई में प्रॉपर्टी और होम लोन के बारे में कुछ भी पूछें।
